title: Jenkins
subtitle: Open source automation server for CI/CD pipelines
comments: Jenkins does not have a standard OpenAPI spec. Skyline uses a custom adapter that discovers available jobs and actions from the /api/json endpoint. Write operations (triggerJob, triggerJobWithParameters) must be explicitly opted in via the jenkins.allow_writes config field.
authNotes: Use your Jenkins username and an API token. Generate a token at {instance}/user/{username}/configure under the API Token section.
